tweets.text: Recording some DJ'ing, probably gonna make it a mixtape & distribute.
"You have to set it on fire?" Nicole asks.
playing a little Grand Theft Auto IV. http://raptr.com/pseudoplacebo
God DAMN IT. DAMN IT.

I really want it to be summer. 

Really tired of this winter.
I want summer so that I can go on hikes and camp with my friends and hang out in the forest and take pictures of sun through green leaves
I want summer so that when it’s late at night I can wander into my backyard and smoke a cigarette in my boxers and watch traffic
I want summer so that I can open all the windows in my bedroom and get woken up by breeze and morning light and birds chirping and shit
I want summer so I can get off the subway 2 stops early and just walk around and buy cucumber/mango & hot sauce from the lady on the corner
I want summer so I can walk down the block and listen to everyone’s boom boxes and smell people’s front yard BBQ and hang out on the stoops
and stay up late because it’s still light out and go to neighborhoods I’ve never been to because everything is beautiful
All I want is for the summer and I can wear a t shirt and lay around in the grass and get slurpies from 7-11 and sit in my backyard

Midtown traffic extremely honky today

This whole city is grumpy right now

I just wanna be home. Don't feel like dealing with travel. Can someone do me a solid and hook me up with a lil teleportation?
Might have to walk to the train station... egh. I hate dealing with trains & shit.
I'm gulping torrents like it's my job.
